resources.string: Don\'t have an account? Sign up
We have sent a link to your email. Click it to authorize this device and log in automatically.
Password must be at least 8 characters long and contain a special character
We sent a 6-digit code to your email. Please enter it below to continue.

Privacy Policy for GameVault
Effective Date: 09/04/2026

Thank you for choosing to be part of our community at GameVault. We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy notice or our practices with regard to your personal information, please contact us at resaresahernandez@gmail.com.

1. What Information Do We Collect?
We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register on the App. The personal information that we collect depends on the context of your interactions with us and the App. The personal information we collect includes the following:

Account Information: Your email address, username, and password.

Profile Data: Optional information you provide, such as a nickname, biography (bio), and profile picture (avatar).

In-App Activity: Data regarding your personal game library, hours played, game statuses (e.g., completed, playing), and the reviews/ratings you post.

2. How Do We Use Your Information?
We use personal information collected via our App for a variety of business purposes described below:

To facilitate account creation and logon process: We use your email and a secure One-Time Password (OTP) verification system to authenticate your identity.

To manage user accounts: We use your information to manage your account, store your library preferences, and display your reviews to the community.

To protect our Services: We may use your information as part of our efforts to keep our App safe and secure (for example, for fraud monitoring and prevention, or banning accounts that violate community rules).

3. How Do We Keep Your Information Safe?
We have implemented appropriate technical and organizational security measures designed to protect the security of any personal information we process.

Encryption: Your passwords are securely hashed and salted using industry-standard cryptography before being stored in our database.

Secure Sessions: We use secure JSON Web Tokens (JWT) to manage your login sessions.

However, despite our safeguards and efforts to secure your information, no electronic transmission over the Internet or information storage technology can be guaranteed to be 100% secure.

4. Will Your Information Be Shared With Anyone?
No. We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. Your data is strictly used to provide and improve the GameVault experience. Public profile information, such as your username, avatar, and game reviews, will be visible to other users of the App.

5. Your Privacy Rights
Depending on your region, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information. At any time, you can:

Review or change the information in your account by logging in to your account settings.

Request the deletion of your account and personal data by contacting us using the contact information provided below.

6. Contact Us
If you have questions or comments about this notice, you may email us at:
resaresahernandez@gmail.com
